# zendesk_support_address (Data Source)

Look up an existing Zendesk support address (recipient address) by ID or email.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `email` (String) The email of the support address. Provide either id or email.
- `id` (String) The ID of the support address. Provide either id or email.

### Read-Only

- `brand_id` (Number)
- `cname_status` (String)
- `created_at` (String)
- `default` (Boolean)
- `dns_results` (String)
- `domain_verification_code` (String)
- `domain_verification_status` (String)
- `forwarding_status` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `spf_status` (String)
- `updated_at` (String)
